Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Unsouled]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — Unsouled is a term used to describe an individual who has no affinity to their spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — An Unsouled at the Foundation stage is a level of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — An Unsouled cannot practice sacred arts and may never have a family of his own to avoid passing on their deformity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — The term Unsouled is used by Keth to address Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Unsouled refers to those who lack madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Unsouled are not allowed to marry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — An Unsouled is a rank or type of practitioner that Lindon holds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — An Unsouled can rise using the resources of a prestigious school of sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Unsouled is a term used to describe someone who started two steps behind.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — No one is Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — An Unsouled is a status or stage of being.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Unsouled is a status or classification within the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The bowl test is used to designate someone as Unsouled.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is an Unsouled.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Unsouled is a status or classification that Kelsa's clan elders used to blame Lindon for.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — In Sacred Valley, the word for 'Empty' is 'Unsouled'.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — An Unsouled can wear a badge made from wintersteel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Unsouled is a symbol in the old language.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Unsouled is a title used to address Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Elders tend not to meet with Unsouled.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Unsouled is a state or identity Lindon once held.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Unsouled are destined to be crushed beneath the Dreadgod's feet.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon feels powerless like an Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Wei Jin Sairus addresses Lindon as Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon warns that anyone who calls him 'Unsouled' dies.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
